data.title: 4th ABRH Forum in Zambia had 600+ participants discussing remedy, reparations, and responsible business in Africa.
data.description: The 4th African Business and Human Rights Forum (ABRH) held in Lusaka, Zambia, came to an end today with over 600 attendees, such as business executives, governmental representatives, and members of civil society, Indigenous Peoples, and national human rights organizations.
Reports in Israel: Germany is expected to lift the arms embargo on Israel following the ceasefire agreement.

data.title: DistriMart/GulfMed Supply gains sole distribution rights for SC Johnson products in Syrian Arab Republic.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Doha, Qatar, it was revealed that DistriMart/GulfMed Supply has been appointed as the sole distributor of SC Johnson products in the Syrian Arab Republic. This new agreement marks a significant milestone in the partnership between the two companies. Under this exclusive arrangement, DistriMart/GulfMed Supply will oversee the distribution of a wide range of SC Johnson products across the country. The move is expected to strengthen SC Johnson's presence in the Syrian market and enhance accessibility to their products for consumers. This strategic decision will likely have a positive impact on both companies' sales figures.

data.title: Aetna's Medicare Advantage plans for 2026 have 81% in 4-Star and 63% in 4.5-Star plans - CVS Health.
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut on October 9, 2025, Aetna®, part of CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS), revealed that more than 81% of its Medicare Advantage (MA) members have enrolled in 2026 Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug (MAPD) plans rated 4 stars or above out of a possible 5 stars.

data.title: Charlotte PR firm derekPR celebrates its 20th anniversary, refocusing on philanthropic initiatives. Started in 2005, the agency aims to amplify campaigns for the greater good.
data.description: A well-known public relations agency with a focus on restaurants has been revived as derekPR in Charlotte, North Carolina on October 9, 2025. Originally established two decades ago, the agency is set to enhance charitable efforts aimed at positively impacting lives. The rebranding marks a new chapter for the agency, which gained recognition on a national level as a startup twenty years ago.

data.title: InterGroup Corp reports FY 2025 results w/ higher Hotel & Real Estate income, improved liquidity, to regain Nasdaq compliance.
data.description: Los Angeles-based company InterGroup Corporation (stock symbol: INTG) released its fiscal year results by June 30, 2025. The report highlighted boosted segment income within Hotel and Real Estate divisions, enhanced liquidity, clearance of going-concern doubts at Portsmouth Square, Inc. Its returns comply with Nasdaq listing stipulations post-review.
North Korea Kim consults Vietnamese leader To Lam Thursday KCNA:

data.title: Portsmouth Square, Inc. reports FY2025 results, alleviates going-concern doubt after hotel refinancing in March.
data.description: In Los Angeles, CA on Oct. 09, 2025, Portsmouth Square, Inc. (OTC: PRSI) shared their fiscal year results up to June 30, 2025, revealing an improvement in their ability to continue operations following a hotel refinancing on March 28, 2025. The company was previously facing uncertainty about their ability to continue as a going concern, which has now been alleviated due to this refinancing and improving operational performance.

data.title: Danaos Corporation prices $500M senior notes at 6.875% due 2032 in private offering.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, on October 9, 2025, Danaos Corporation revealed the pricing details of its recent offering. The Company, listed on NYSE as DAC, disclosed the issuance of $500 million worth of 6.875% Senior Notes set to mature in 2032. The notes are part of a private offering exempt from registration regulations.

data.title: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals announces granting equity awards to 27 employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on Oct. 1, 2025.
data.description: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), recently disclosed the granting of equity awards to 27 newly hired non-executive employees on October 1, 2025. These equity awards were issued as inducements under Madrigal’s 2025 Inducement Plan and were officially sanctioned by the company’s independent Compensation Committee following the guidelines of Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Amplifi Vascular's Vein Dilation System shows promise in study, secures $6.9M funding, and receives FDA approval.
data.description: Amplifi Vascular, a company based in St. Louis, reported encouraging outcomes from its initial human trial, secured a $6.9 million Series A funding, and received approval from the FDA for its Investigational Device Exemption. The company's Vein Dilation System, a revolutionary product, was the focus of these updates.

data.title: Finout's Enterprise FinOps platform now integrated with Oracle Cloud, providing multicloud cost visibility and optimization.
data.description: Finout, a prominent provider of multicloud cost visibility and optimization solutions and an Oracle partner, has revealed that its Enterprise FinOps platform has obtained Integrated with Oracle Cloud Expertise status. This platform is now accessible on the Oracle Cloud Marketplace, a hub for Oracle customers in search of reliable business applications and services. The marketplace offers distinct solutions that complement Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications. This recent development signifies new opportunities for businesses, with access to Finout's renowned platform on the Oracle Cloud Marketplace.

data.title: Grace Adventures Ministries President, Steve Prudhomme, retires after 3 decades of service effective March 31, 2026.
data.description: A prominent organization, Grace Adventures Ministries, based in Silver Lake, Michigan, which has been at the forefront of developing students and supporting families since 1946, has disclosed the retirement of its President, Steve Prudhomme. His retirement is set to take place on March 31, 2026, marking the conclusion of his close to thirty years of dedicated tenure.
